prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约5479名、9695名、6045名、5623名、7440名，整体波动较大。2022年因专业组调整出现位次大幅后移（9695名），2023–2024年回 升至6000名以内，2025年再度后移至7440名，近两年呈后移趋势。2025年基准位次约7440名；该校在北京市招生计划2021–2023年均为20人，2024年增至22人，2 025年增至24人；2026年计划大幅缩减至14人，较2025年减少约41.7%。大幅缩招使竞争压力有所缓解，但考生总数增长抵消了部分效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工 程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第27名，近年排名稳定在23–27名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏负面，原校长因涉嫌严重违 纪违法被查，涉及学术不端问题，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第85位（一般），短视频曝光量较低，未形成明显热度助推。2024–2025年声誉亦偏负面，主 要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号；第五轮学科评估中，中南大学拥有13个A-及以上学科，其中冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、计算 机科学与技术A-等，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、口腔医学、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与中南大 学优势学科高度匹配，相关专业报考热度较高；北京市2026年高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧中南大学位于湖南长沙，非北京本地高校，在京招生占比极小（2025年仅24人），地域偏好对北京考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次7440名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减41.7%（使位次前移）、北京市考生总数暴增29.7%（使位次后移）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）及学校层次/优势学科吸引力等多重因素 ，考虑考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应，小幅向上修正。预测2026年最低位次约5730名，区间5230–6230名。

- 临床医学（八年制）
- 计算机科学与技术（拔尖基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 工科试验班（新材料类大飞机智慧创新班）。

- 暂无。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年招生计划仅14人且专业高度集中（临床医学八年制6人、口腔医学2人、计算机拔尖班2人、两个工科试验班各2人），均为热门方向。预测位次区间5230–6230名，建议位次 在此区间内的考生以二档工科试验班为主力填报，位次优于区间下限（<5230名）可冲刺一档临床医学八年制或计算机拔尖班。由于招生人数极少，各专业竞争均较激烈，建议合 理设置志愿梯度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 5479, 9695, 6045, 5623, and 7440, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, the ranking dropped sharply to 9695. From 2023 to 2024, it rebounded to within 6000, but in 2025, it fell again to 7440, indicating a recent downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7440. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing was 20 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 22 in 2024, and to 24 in 2025. In 2026, the plan sharply decreases to 14 students, a reduction of about 41.7% compared to 2025. The significant reduction in enrollment eases competition pressure to some extent, but the increase in the total number of candidates offsets some of the effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 27th, with a stable range of 23–27 in recent years, placing it among the top domestic universities. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative, as the former president was investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, involving academic misconduct, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with low short video exposure, not forming a significant popularity boost. In 2024–2025, the reputation was also slightly negative, mainly related to enrollment gaps or abnormal admission score signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Central South University has 13 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Metallurgical Engineering and Nursing, A in Materials Science and Engineering, A- in Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting many candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are consistently highly recommended, closely matching Central South University's advantageous disciplines, leading to high application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the total number of Beijing Gaokao candidates is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, not a local Beijing university, with a very small enrollment proportion in Beijing (only 24 in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact on Beijing candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7440, the 41.7% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (which moves the ranking forward), the 29.7% surge in Beijing candidates (which moves the ranking backward), the slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and the attractiveness of the university's level and advantageous disciplines, along with the intensified competition due to the candidate surge, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5730, with a range of 5230–6230.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top Talent Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Engineering Pilot Class (AI Smart Innovation Class)
- Engineering Pilot Class (New Materials Large Aircraft Smart Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the enrollment plan is only 14 students, with highly concentrated majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program: 6, Stomatology: 2, Computer Top Talent Base Class: 2, two Engineering Pilot Classes: 2 each), all of which are popular directions. The predicted ranking range is 5230–6230. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 Engineering Pilot Classes as their main choice. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<5230) can aim for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program or Computer Top Talent Base Class. Due to the extremely small enrollment numbers, competition for each major is intense, so it is advisable to set a reasonable volunteer gradient.
